prompt: {"type":"character reference sheet","style":"clean high-end 3D anime render, soft studio lighting, white seamless background, muted futuristic military streetwear aesthetic","character":{"name":"{argument name=\"character name\" default=\"original character\"}","gender_presentation":"androgynous young adult","build":"slim","hair":{"color":"{argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"white silver\"}","style":"short shaggy layered hair peeking out from under a knit beanie"},"face":"face obscured and simplified, minimal visible features","outfit":{"headwear":"taupe ribbed knit beanie","outerwear":"oversized cropped taupe technical jacket with high collar, heavy seams, utility patches, and short cape-like shoulder yoke fastened with toggle closures","neck":"thick corrugated breathing tube looped from collar to backpack unit","gloves":"dark fitted gloves","pants":"black slim tactical pants with subtle sheen, white side stripes, thigh holster strap, and attached utility pouch","belt":"black utility belt with bold text reading {argument name=\"belt text\" default=\"INDUSTRIES\"}","footwear":"chunky taupe and gray futuristic sneakers"},"gear":{"backpack":"large industrial life-support style backpack with hoses and antenna dish","weapon":"compact sci-fi pistol with angular body and glowing green light panel","canisters":"2 glowing green cylindrical canisters hanging at the front of the waist"},"colors":["taupe","gray","black","white silver","neon green accents"]},"layout":{"canvas":"vertical","sections":[{"title":"full body","position":"left","count":1,"labels":["standing full-body pose"]},{"title":"portrait views","position":"right column","count":3,"labels":["front head close-up","three-quarter head close-up","front or slightly alternate head close-up"]}],"centerpiece":"full-body character standing with one hand on hip and the other holding a pistol, legs apart in a confident neutral pose","composition":"large character occupying the left two-thirds of the page, three evenly spaced cropped headshots stacked vertically on the right"},"render_notes":"ultra-clean product-sheet presentation, crisp material definition, detailed fabric folds, plastic and metal hard-surface parts, subtle shadows only, no environment props beyond the character gear","quality":"high detail, polished concept art turnaround sheet feel"}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"character reference sheet","style":"干净的高端 3D 动漫渲染，柔和的摄影棚灯光，白色无缝背景，低饱和度未来感军事街头服饰美学","character":{"name":"{argument name=\"character name\" default=\"原创角色\"}","gender_presentation":"中性化年轻成人","build":"苗条","hair":{"color":"{argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"银白色\"}","style":"短款碎发，从针织帽下露出"},"face":"面部模糊且简化，几乎没有可见特征","outfit":{"headwear":"灰褐色罗纹针织帽","outerwear":"超大款短版灰褐色机能夹克，配有高领、厚实接缝、功能性贴片，以及通过扣环固定的短斗篷式肩部覆层","neck":"粗大的波纹呼吸管，从衣领连接至背包装置","gloves":"深色贴合手套","pants":"黑色修身战术长裤，带有细微光泽、白色侧条纹、大腿枪套带及附加功能袋","belt":"黑色功能腰带，带有醒目文字 {argument name=\"belt text\" default=\"INDUSTRIES\"}","footwear":"厚底灰褐色与灰色相间的未来感运动鞋"},"gear":{"backpack":"大型工业生命支持风格背包，配有软管和天线碟","weapon":"紧凑型科幻手枪，机身棱角分明，带有发光的绿色面板","canisters":"2 个发光的绿色圆柱形罐子，挂在腰部前方"},"colors":["灰褐色","灰色","黑色","银白色","霓虹绿点缀"],"layout":{"canvas":"垂直","sections":[{"title":"全身像","position":"左侧","count":1,"labels":["站立全身姿势"]},{"title":"头部视图","position":"右侧栏","count":3,"labels":["正面头部特写","四分之三侧面头部特写","正面或略有差异的头部特写"]}],"centerpiece":"全身角色站立，一只手叉腰，另一只手持枪，双腿分开，呈现自信的中性姿势","composition":"大型角色占据页面左侧三分之二，三张均匀分布的头部特写在右侧垂直堆叠"},"render_notes":"超洁净的产品展示页风格，清晰的材质定义，细腻的织物褶皱，塑料与金属硬表面部件，仅有细微阴影，除角色装备外无环境道具","quality":"高细节，精致的概念艺术转面图质感"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 未来感战术角色设定集：一份精美的角色参考设定集，展示了一位身着科幻街头服饰的特工全身像及三张头部特写，非常适合概念设计与视觉开发。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up, full-body, layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime, 3d, sci-fi, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: studio lighting, neon]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
